title: CBS persbericht: traditionele criminaliteit gelijk gebleven
note: The short half of a deliberate pair with cbs-veiligheidsmonitor-2025: same underlying findings, ~700 words versus 127 pages. A deck from the long source should land on roughly the same headline message as a deck from this one; divergence means the pipeline is drowning in long context.
licence: CBS content is reusable with source attribution ('Bron: CBS').
expectedCharacteristics: Leads on the headline victim percentages for traditional and online crime
Frames stability as the story rather than listing every figure
Stays in Dutch with correct Dutch number and percentage conventions, crediting CBS
